doc_title_en: Notice of Revision to FY3/26 Dividend Forecast (Dividend Increase)

key_facts.reason_jp: 株主還元を経営課題と認識し、内部留保と成果配分のバランスを勘案した安定配当

summary_en: Final dividend for FY3/26 raised from 40 to 45 yen/share (+12.5%); combined with interim dividend of 40 yen/share already paid, annual dividend revised to 85 yen/share from prior 80 yen forecast. Rationale: balanced shareholder returns against internal reserves and business reinvestment needs.
summary_jp: FY3/26期末配当を40円/株から45円/株に引き上げ（+12.5%）。既実施の中間配当40円と合わせ、通期配当85円/株に修正（従来予想80円）。理由：株主還元と内部留保・事業投資のバランス考慮。
tag_en: Dividend - FY3/26 final dividend raised 40→45 yen/share (+12.5%) | annual 85 yen (vs 80 yen prior forecast)
tag_jp: 配当 - FY3/26期末配当 40円→45円/株（+12.5%） | 通期85円（前回予想80円）
